Robots under IEEE RAS.name: Wheeled Rover
Robots under IEEE RAS.description: Team NITS YANTRARNAV, representing NIT Silchar, has qualified for the live demonstration round at the ISRO Robotics Challenge-URSC 2024 (IROC-U2024) and entered the semi-finals!

Robots under IEEE RAS.name: Poser
Robots under IEEE RAS.description: Robot that can mimic human emotions and human posture

Robots under IEEE RAS.name: 6-Axis Robotic Manipulator
Robots under IEEE RAS.description: Has 6 degrees of freedom → 3 for position (X, Y, Z) + 3 for orientation (roll, pitch, yaw). Structure: base, shoulder, elbow, wrist, end-effector. High flexibility – mimics human arm movements.

Published projects.name: A review of advances in large language and vision models for robotic manipulation: Techniques, integrations, and challenges
Published projects.description: Recent transformer-based models are improving robotic manipulation by enhancing planning, decision-making, and adaptability. This review highlights their integration with control systems, key benefits, challenges, and future research directions.
Published projects.authors: Sajjad Hussain, Shwetangshu Biswas, Amandip Dutta, Md Saad, Almas Baimagambetov, Khizer Saeed & Nikolaos Polatidis
